response.overview: A wandering preacher enters the chaotic, glitter‑soaked home of Gloria, a woman devoted to her own radiant and unsettling form of spirituality. What begins as a polite visit turns into a surreal battle of faith, as Gloria draws him into her world of rituals, visions and shimmering revelations. When he opens a mysterious glittering box, the preacher undergoes an unexpected transformation that blurs the line between devotion, delusion and divine light.
response.title: Gloria In Excelsis Glitter
